lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Can I help you with something, traveller? I am experimenting with dark magic; it is a dangerous craft, and I prefer not to be disturbed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you recharge my Staff of Iban?

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Your staff is already as fully charged as it can go.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: I'll want 100,000 coins to recharge the Staff of Iban.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you recharge my Staff of Iban?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you upgrade my Staff of Iban?

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Hah! Yes, I can upgrade it to hold 2500 charges, enough to cast Iban's magic 2500 times at monsters or 1250 times at people like you. That'll cost you 200,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I'll bear it in mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you repair my broken Staff of Iban?

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: The Staff of Iban holds dangerous magic, traveller. I can fix it, but it will cost you - the process could kill me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much?

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: 200,000 coins. That'll give it 120 charges, enough to cast Iban's magic 120 times at monsters or 60 times at people like you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here's 200,000 coins. Please repair the staff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I appreciate that.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: You be careful with that thing!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you make it hold more than 120 charges?

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Hah! Yes, I can upgrade it to hold 2500 charges, enough to cast Iban's magic 2500 times at monsters or 1250 times at people like you. That'll cost you 400,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I'll bear it in mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you to it.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Why do you interrupt me, traveller? I am experimenting with dark magic; it is a dangerous craft, and I prefer not to be disturbed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm just looking around.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: There's nothing to see here, just despair and death.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Staaaaaaaaves!

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Traveller, I have no idea what you are talking about. If you want my help with staves, perhaps you should show me one.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Your staff is already as fully charged as it can go.

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: I'll want 100,000 coins to recharge the Staff of Iban.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you recharge my Staff of Iban?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you upgrade my Staff of Iban?

sections.title: Using an Iban's staff on Dark Mage
Using a broken Iban's staff on Dark Mage
Using other items on the Dark Mage

lines.speaker: Dark Mage
lines.text: Your items interest me not, traveller.
